pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java compiler source and target properties to version 17 to align with the new JDK baseline.
Add Jakarta XML Binding (JAXB) dependencies to replace the module removed from the JDK in Java 11.
Add Jakarta Persistence API dependencies to replace the javax.persistence module removed from the JDK.
Add Jersey 3.x dependencies which implement the Jakarta EE 9+ JAX-RS specification (jakarta namespace).
Add Jakarta Expression Language dependencies required by Jakarta EE 9+ runtimes.
Add Tyrus dependencies for Jakarta WebSocket API support in the new JDK environment.
Replace JUnit 4 with JUnit 5 (Jupiter) BOM and engine for modern testing support.
Add Mockito core and JUnit Jupiter integration for mocking in unit tests.
Add Arquillian BOM for integration testing support.
Add Hamcrest matchers for fluent assertion support in tests.
Upgrade Lombok to a newer version compatible with recent JDKs.
Add Eclipse Collections library for enhanced collection utilities.
Add H2 in-memory database driver for testing.
Add PostgreSQL JDBC driver for database connectivity.
Add MySQL Connector/J for database connectivity.
Add EclipseLink as a JPA provider implementation.
Add Hibernate Core as a JPA provider implementation.
Add Java JWT library for token handling.
Reformat the project root element to a single line for cleaner XML structure.

.dockerignore.general_idea: Remove .github directory from .dockerignore to allow CI configuration files to be included in the Docker build context.

.github/ci-settings.xml.general_idea: Changed the SonarQube host URL from a public university server to a local development machine address.

.github/workflows/ci.yml.general_idea: Switch CI build and deploy steps from direct runner execution to a Docker container script to ensure environment consistency.
Add Microsoft Teams webhook notifications for build success and failure events.
Correct the Maven site deployment command syntax from 'site:deploy' to 'site-deploy'.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Switch the Maven build stage base image to a custom repository to ensure compatibility or availability.
Remove environment variable definitions for Bintray credentials as the service is deprecated or no longer used.
Dockerfile.human_impl: Removed ARG BINTRAY_USERNAME, ENV BINTRAY_USERNAME, ARG BINTRAY_API_KEY, ENV BINTRAY_API_KEY

Dockerfile.general_idea: Update the path to the Maven settings file to reflect a new directory structure for CI configuration.

build/build.sh.general_idea: Removes build arguments for Bintray credentials as the artifact repository is being migrated away from Bintray.
Adds a build argument to pass the SonarQube token into the Docker build for code quality analysis.
Adds comments documenting the required environment variables for the build script.
build/build.sh.human_impl: ## MAKE SURE YOU HAVE enviroment variables ...

mvn.sh.general_idea: Switch the base Docker image from an OpenJ9 JDK 11 variant to an AdoptOpenJDK 16 variant to align with the target JDK version.
Replace short-form Docker CLI flags with their long-form equivalents for better readability and standard compliance.
Mount the local SSH directory into the container to enable secure Git operations or artifact uploads.
Mount the local gitconfig into the container to preserve user-specific Git settings.
Replace the direct user ID mapping with PUID/PGID environment variables and run Maven as a specific container user to fix permission issues in the new image.
mvn.sh.human_impl: --env PUID=`id -u` -e PGID=`id -g` ... runuser --user user --group user -- mvn
